title: Fermented Canadian Bean Crumble
description: A comforting plant-based dish featuring crispy bean crumbles that have been infused with fermented flavors and a caramelized touch, perfect for a comforting snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons maple syrup or agave nectar

instructions: Soak pinto beans in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the soaked beans. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Add olive oil, maple syrup, salt, and lemon juice into a mixing bowl, then add drained beans.
Mix all ingredients until the beans are evenly coated with the mixture. Spread them onto an oiled baking sheet in a single layer.
Once done, reduce heat to 275°F (140°C) and bake another 30-60 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Serve warm with optional fresh dill garnish.
